name: kimi-partner
description: Delegate explicitly approved frontend implementation tasks from Codex to local Kimi Code, then return them to Codex for verification.

interface.shortDescription: Let Codex hand an approved frontend task to Kimi and verify the result.
interface.longDescription: Kimi Partner gives Codex an opt-in local delegation loop: start a Kimi Code task in a Git project, monitor it asynchronously, return review feedback to the same session, and keep final testing and browser acceptance with Codex.
defaultPrompt: Let Kimi implement this frontend task, then verify it yourself.
Ask Kimi for an alternative frontend version and compare the result.
